CustomField.label: Is My Demo Contact
CustomField.description: Formula: true when the running user assigned this Contact's Demo Persona OR created the linked Demo_Persona__c record. Used to filter the "My Demo Contacts" list view (which can't reference $User.Id directly).
CustomField.formula: IF( Demo_Assigned_By__c = $User.Id, TRUE, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Demo_Persona__c)) && Demo_Persona__r.CreatedById = $User.Id, TRUE, FALSE ) )
